description: Quality evals for 1Password Environments and hook validation workflows.

cases.title: Secure local mounted env setup
cases.prompt: Set up 1Password Environments so my local .env is mounted securely and validated before Copilot runs commands.

assertions.description: Response mentions hook-based validation before command execution

cases.title: Vite restart loop mitigation
cases.prompt: My Vite dev server keeps restarting after I mounted .env from 1Password. What's the fix?

assertions.description: Response identifies file watcher and FIFO interaction
Response recommends ignoring mounted env file in Vite watch config

cases.title: Scope boundary to SSH skill
cases.prompt: Help me generate SSH keys in 1Password and set up git commit signing.

assertions.description: Response avoids positioning Environments as primary solution
